project.name: aiFetchly
project.summary: AI-powered marketing automation desktop app with scraping, email marketing, RAG, and worker-process automation.

guidance: Prefer existing TypeScript, Vue, Electron Forge, Vite, TypeORM, and module/controller patterns.
Place child and worker process entry points under src/childprocess.
For AI IPC handlers, check USER_AI_ENABLED before parsing request data or calling AI APIs.
Use focused tests for touched modules; run yarn tsc-result for broad TypeScript validation when practical.
